summary: Iter22 P1/P2 retention & attribution features fully validated. Backend: 10/10 iter22 PASS + 24/24 regression (iter20+iter21) PASS. Frontend: marketing savings banner renders correctly when active commission exists, UTM params present in /config referral link, Signup ref persistence with 30d TTL via localStorage works (badge 'Te trajo AuditTestCo' persists across reload without query param), regression routes /flujo /landing /marketing /config render OK.
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py: 4 tasks definidos (run_commission_expiry, send_trial_ending_emails, send_weekly_digest_emails, run_onboarding_coach). Smoke import OK. send_trial_ending_emails dedupe via email_logs (24h) — buen patrón. send_weekly_digest_emails respeta lunes 09:00 UTC + DIGEST_FORCE=1 trigger manual.
commission_service._notify_referrer_new_commission: respeta ausencia de SMTP (no llama send_*). Validado por test_email_not_called_when_smtp_not_configured.

routers/coach._trial_days_left: maneja correctamente subscription_status='active' (None), within trial (días restantes), expired (0). TRIAL_DURATION_DAYS=14, TRIAL_WARN_THRESHOLD_DAYS=3 constantes claras.
MarketingEffectiveness banner: condición 'active_count>0 OR total_credited_usd>0' implementada correctamente. data-testid='marketing-referral-savings-banner' presente.
ReferralProgramSection.js: refLink incluye utm_source=referral&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=tenant_share verificado en runtime.

Signup.js: REF_STORAGE_KEY='inmobot_ref_attribution' correcto. Estructura JSON: {ref, ref_celebration_id, utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, stored_at}. TTL 30d via comparación stored_at vs Date.now() (no se guarda expires_at — es implícito, OK). Badge 'Te trajo {business_name}' resuelve nombre via API (validado: 'AuditTestCo' para demo-inmobiliaria). Prioridad query > localStorage correcta.
seed_data_creation: Test backend pytest crea fixtures temporales en collections tenants/agents/coach_nudges/commissions con prefijo TEST_iter22_ y limpia en teardown. Adicionalmente para verificar banner runtime, sembré una commission TEST_iter22_banner_seed (referrer=demo-inmobiliaria, status=active, total_credited_usd=12.0) y la limpié al final del test frontend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter22 100% validado. Banner runtime validado: 'Llevás $12 ahorrados en facturación gracias a referidos / Este mes: -$5 de descuento (1 referido activo)'. UTM en refLink confirmado: /signup?ref=demo-inmobiliaria&utm_source=referral&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=tenant_share. Signup attribution localStorage: {ref:'demo-inmobiliaria',ref_celebration_id:null,utm_source:'test',utm_medium:null,utm_campaign:null,stored_at:<ms>}. Schedulers validados solo por smoke import (digest semanal lunes 09:00 UTC requiere DIGEST_FORCE=1 para trigger manual). SMTP no configurado en preview env, pero mocks confirman invocación correcta de send_new_referral_commission con kwargs {to_email, referrer_business_name, referred_business_name, amount_per_month_usd, active_count}.
rca of the issue: N/A - no issues encountered. All 22 backend regression tests across iter20+iter21+iter22 PASS, all frontend acceptance criteria met.
